title: Iran FM Araghchi says MoU with US 'has never been closer'
snippet: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated that a Memorandum of Understanding with the United States 'has never been closer.' He announced the possibility of remote signing if a deal is agreed upon and urged media not to speculate on the content of the agreement. This marks a significant tone shift from Iran's previous denials and the FM's earlier characterization of deal reports as 'merely speculation.'
tag_reason: Major reversal from Iran FM who previously called deal reports 'merely speculation'; remote signing announcement is new procedural detail; 'never been closer' strongest positive signal from Iran diplomatic establishment
